events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May 79th Birthday
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to stadium anthems, Brian May's guitar work is iconic. We're celebrating the Queen legend turning 79 this Sunday.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger 83rd Birthday
angles.copy: Still moving like Jagger at 83! We're wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Sunday.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" as its first broadcast.

angles.name: MTV 45th Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago this Sunday, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing music. The first video? The ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, launching them into Britpop superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. The album that defined a generation and kickstarted Britpop. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal counterculture event, began on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. The iconic Woodstock Festival kicked off on this day in 1969.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years since his passing
events.blurb: The music world remembers Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 49 years ago, the King of Rock and Roll left us. Today, we pay tribute to the enduring legacy of Elvis Presley.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years since his passing
events.blurb: The hip-hop world remembers Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away on September 13, 1996, six days after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 30 years since we lost a true legend. Today, we honour the life and unparalleled impact of Tupac Shakur on music and culture.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years since his passing
events.blurb: The music world remembers guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: 56 years ago, we lost a true guitar god. Today, we celebrate the revolutionary sound and enduring legacy of Jimi Hendrix.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Walk across that zebra crossing! It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', their penultimate masterpiece.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' iconic frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde 75th Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still a force of nature with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis legend and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher 54th Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still rock 'n' roll.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on October 11, 1971, becoming his best-selling solo track.

angles.name: Imagine Single Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players with "1,000 songs in your pocket."

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? It's 25 years since Apple unveiled the device that changed how we listen to music forever. What song was first on yours?

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. It's James Bond Day! We're celebrating 007 with all the iconic theme tunes and asking, who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles songwriter and peace activist, John Lennon, would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: John Lennon Would Be 86
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Comedy icon John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese 87th Birthday
angles.copy: And now for something completely different... Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles gave us the sprawling masterpiece simply known as 'The White Album'. A truly diverse and influential record.
